title: Cough follow-up in GP

presenting_history.text: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.
presenting_history.rationale: The exact DHA history section supports cough duration, quality, timing, triggers, risk factors, associated symptoms, and interval change without assigning a respiratory diagnosis.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

red_flags.text: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.
red_flags.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports clinician-assessed severe, respiratory, systemic, bleeding, neurological, or deterioration concerns and available examination without asserting a negative.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

red_flags.text: Supports clinician-led emergency, family-medicine, and pulmonary referral according to the documented cough context.
red_flags.rationale: The exact referral section supports clinician-entered safety net, referral status, questions, and follow-up without assigning urgency automatically.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led emergency, family-medicine, and pulmonary referral according to the documented cough context.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

investigations.text: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.
investigations.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording already reviewed blood, chest radiograph, lung-function, sputum, ECG, or advanced-imaging context without ordering tests.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

source_limitations: Current cough phenotype, observations, examination, cause, diagnosis, test, medicine, referral, urgency, and interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.

All previously supported GP legacy-item mappings were conservatively removed because exact item identity, direct support, and item-specific applicability were not independently established under the fail-closed contract.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
